title: Bullerproof Armor System Mod
description: It is compatible with the TACZ mod.This mod adds weapon, ammunition, and equipment tiers, ranging from Level 1 to Level 6. It is compatible with the TACZ mod.
body:
A realistic armor-penetration combat mod.

Features:
• 100% damage reduction, custom durability
• Ammo/Gun tiers, +20% damage per level
• Auto-sync highest ammo tier from inventory
• Supports TACZ, Pillager's Gun, and all gun mods

Commands: /bas help
Shortcut: F8

Supported: 1.20.1 Forge
